narrative:
Huber Heights 3-E (precinct in Montgomery County) has 972 registered voters, with 64.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
